name: ar5iv-vscode
description: Live ar5iv preview for LaTeX documents in VS Code.

ar5iv.conversionMode.description: Conversion mode. Auto uses the bundled latexml-oxide LSP engine (Linux), falling back to the hosted backend URL elsewhere.

ar5iv.backendUrl.description: Base URL for hosted conversion on platforms where the bundled engine cannot run (latexml-oxide is Ubuntu-only).

ar5iv.latexmlOxidePath.description: Absolute path to a latexml-oxide engine (the `latexml_oxide` LSP server). Empty means use the engine bundled with the extension, then PATH.

ar5iv.debounceMs.description: Delay after edits before refreshing the preview.

ar5iv.demoSampleOnStartup.description: On activation with no editor open, open a sample LaTeX document with the preview beside it. Enabled for the hosted /vscode web demo; off for normal use.

scripts.build: npm run build:assets && npm run build:desktop && npm run build:web && npm run build:preview
scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p media && cp ../frontend/public/css/ar5iv.css media/ar5iv.css && cp ../frontend/public/css/ar5iv-fonts.css media/ar5iv-fonts.css
scripts.package:vsix: npm run build:engine && npm run build && vsce package --out ar5iv-vscode.vsix
scripts.build:engine: cargo build --release --bin latexml_oxide --manifest-path ../../latexml-oxide/Cargo.toml && mkdir -p bin && cp ../../latexml-oxide/target/release/latexml_oxide bin/latexml_oxide
